title: How to make the "contact" colume auto generate the first and last name
excerpt: I’m curious if there is a way for the first and last name to be in the “Contact” area. I am wanting to change them in bulk if I can.

posts.author: soldbybritteny (Britteny Stevenson)
posts.cookedHtml: I’m curious if there is a way for the first and last name to be in the “Contact” area. I am wanting to change them in bulk if I can.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: What do you currently have there? You can have the item name be whatever you want.
